title: Increase in total nitrogen concentration in rivers and streams due to human activities
subtitle: Relative increase in nitrogen concentrations in rivers and streams from human activity, compared to natural baseline conditions
source: McDowell, R. W., Luo, D., Pletnyakov, P., Upsdell, M., & Dodds, W. K. (2025). Anthropogenic nutrient inputs cause excessive algal growth for nearly half the world’s population. Nature Communications, 16(1), 1830. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-57054-8
